spec_cross_check.item: financial tracker monthly revenue renders unavailable
financial tracker EPS renders unavailable
financial tracker margin renders unavailable
financial tracker ROE renders unavailable
financial tracker cash flow renders unavailable
TTM valuation renders unavailable
percentile valuation renders unavailable
enabling requires free-source, normalization, PIT, and quality contracts
Forward EPS/PE unavailable in this product phase
Adjusted Close disabled until adjusted OHLCV and volume policy approved; Close is the only current price basis
advance/decline market breadth needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
institutional flows need separately admitted source, render unavailable
VIX needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
DXY needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
US 10-year yield needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
FX needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
futures position needs separately admitted source, renders unavailable
Z-score exposes setting vocabulary only; no calculation result without admitted price-policy contract
manual observation fields (industry theme, watch status, human fundamental score, human note) are local prototype drafts
fair-value worksheet manual inputs labelled draft; not market consensus or official forward estimate
formula rows are UI drafts; P1 does not execute nested logic or derive missing inputs
factor definitions and total score are future/human-run, never automatic
regime inputs (index/MA, rolling return, volatility, breadth, futures positioning, VIX) remain unavailable unless source admitted
tranche planning, allocation methods, and risk limits are explicit human plans, not an execution engine
validation settings are a local draft with PIT-safe signal/fill invariant
saved report metrics only from a reproducible saved result

acceptance_notes: Every unavailable, disabled, and draft-only item in docs/tqr-research-platform-spec.md maps to exactly one contract in workflow/tqr-unavailable-field-contracts.json; 26 of 26 spec items cross-checked pass.

Twelve contract categories are defined: six unavailable (official fundamentals, forward EPS/PE, adjusted close, market breadth and institutional flows, external-risk indicators, regime inputs) and six draft (Z-score computed field, manual observation fields, fair-value worksheet, formula and factor, validation settings, tranche and risk planning).

Each contract records its field list, render behaviour (unavailable/disabled/draft), required source type, enabling preconditions, and spec line references; enabling preconditions cite the spec's free-source, normalization, PIT, and quality requirements and, for Adjusted Close, the P5.1 unblock plus P5.4 application in workflow/tqe-p5-adjusted-ohlcv-volume-policy.json.

The spec was not modified and no field was enabled; the contract file carries an explicit cannot_claim list covering field enablement, draft promotion, source admission, spec modification, P5.1 unblock, and nested-logic execution.
No git mutations were performed; verification was offline JSON parsing only.
